raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Accessory dwelling units (ADUs) are recognized as a housing opportunity for various populations at below market prices within existing neighborhoods.",
    "Current California law makes it difficult to convert unused commercial and retail space into accessory dwelling units (ADUs).",
    "Senate Bill 778 clarifies that the conversion of unused commercial and retail space into ADUs is a matter of statewide concern.",
    "Senate Bill 591 facilitates financing for affordable housing targeting senior citizens and transition-age youth.",
    "Tax credits are commonly used to finance affordable housing for individuals aged 55 and older, but often come with restrictions against including other affordable units in the same building.",
    "Intergenerational housing provides documented social and health benefits to seniors.",
    "Creating housing that enables interaction between seniors and youth fosters a community that traditional age-restricted housing cannot match."
  ]
}
```
